name_cn:
Genuine leather
New
Model 1773 23-17-5.5 (includes extended leather shoulder strap)
Mini Nappa Lambskin Flamenco Clutch
The Flamenco Clutch, first released in the 1970s, features a drawstring closure and a signature twisted knot. The Flamenco Purse has been cleverly redesigned with a delicate knotted top and a soft, sensual draped silhouette. This version is crafted from soft Nappa lambskin.
Crossbody or shoulder carry
Detachable, adjustable shoulder strap
Subtle magnetic closure
Suede lining
LOEWE hot stamping
): Gold
Material: Lambskin
Weight: 0.2 kg
